purpose: SHA-256 of normalized identity_attack-feeder civil_comments TRAINING texts. fit_contraction.py excludes any spectrum row whose normalized-text hash is in this set, so the contraction's OOF number is measured on rows the feeder never trained on (leakage control for the identity_attack lift). norm = collapse-whitespace + strip + lower.
source_corpus: identity_attack feeder civil_comments split (700 attack + 700 clean), scripts/build_identity_attack.py
